edge_hypothesis: Supertrend tail harvester at 8:1 R:R achieves PF=1.921 — the system champion — and the R:R curve is STILL CLIMBING. MACD's curve peaked at 7:1 (PF=1.712) then declined (8:1→1.442, 12:1→1.302). Supertrend's curve shows no inflection: 5:1→PF=1.395, 8:1→PF=1.921. Two critical questions remain unanswered: (1) WHERE does supertrend's R:R curve peak? Testing 10:1 and 12:1 will close the curve. If PF continues rising at 10:1, supertrend may be fundamentally different from MACD — its entry signal (direction flip) may be higher quality than MACD histogram cross, producing longer-duration winners. (2) IS ADX GATING HELPING OR HURTING? Data shows monotonic improvement with ADX relaxation: ADX>20 (baseline) → ADX>15 → ADX>10 (PF=1.907, 99 trades). The logical extreme is ADX>0 (no gate at all). If removing ADX entirely maintains or improves PF, ADX gating was NEVER the source of edge — the supertrend direction flip alone carries the signal quality. This would simplify the strategy and maximize trade count. Conversely, if PF drops sharply at ADX>0, we've found the floor and know ADX>10 is the optimal relaxation. Regime assumption: ALL (supertrend 8:1 is all-regimes-profitable). Ranging is the profit engine (PF=2.91 at 8:1). Invalidation: (1) If PF declines from 8:1→10:1→12:1, supertrend peaks at 8:1 like MACD peaks at 7:1 — each template has its own fixed R:R optimum. (2) If ADX>0 PF drops below 1.2, ADX gating is confirmed necessary even at relaxed levels.

variants.name: supertrend_tail_harvester_10to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/4h with 10:1 R:R (1.0x ATR stop / 10.0x ATR TP). ADX > 10 (proven optimal relaxation). This is the first data point beyond 8:1 for supertrend. If PF > 1.921 (the 8:1 result), the curve is still climbing and supertrend may peak at 12:1+. If PF < 1.921 but > 1.4, the peak is between 8:1 and 10:1. At breakeven win rate of 9.1%, even a slight drop in signal quality is tolerable. Expected: ~85 trades (matching 8:1 trade count since entry signal is identical — only TP changes), lower win rate but higher average winner.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (supertrend bullish direction change).
ADX_14 > 10 (ultra-relaxed ADX gate — captures ranging signals).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (supertrend bearish direction change).
ADX_14 > 10 (ultra-relaxed ADX gate — captures ranging signals).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (10.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
R:R = 10:1. Needs 9.1% win rate to break even after fees.
Key test: does supertrend R:R curve continue climbing beyond 8:1?
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 10.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — system's highest quality entry signal
ADX_14 > 10 ultra-relaxed gate — maximizes ranging signal capture
ATR_14 for 1.0x stop / 10.0x TP — R:R curve extension point 1

variants.name: supertrend_tail_harvester_12to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/4h with 12:1 R:R (1.0x ATR stop / 12.0x ATR TP). ADX > 10. The extreme end of the R:R curve. MACD at 12:1 showed PF=1.302 (declining from 7:1 peak of 1.712). If supertrend at 12:1 maintains PF > 1.5, it confirms supertrend has a fundamentally WIDER optimal R:R range than MACD. On ETH/4h, ATR is ~$50-80, so 12.0x ATR TP = $600-960 of price movement. These are major trend legs that occur during regime transitions and breakouts — exactly where supertrend direction flips excel. Breakeven win rate: 7.7%. Expected: ~85 trades, ~15% win rate (matching MACD 8:1 ultra pattern).
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (supertrend bullish direction change).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (supertrend bearish direction change).

variants.name: supertrend_no_adx_gate_8to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/4h with 8:1 R:R (1.0x ATR stop / 8.0x ATR TP) and NO ADX gate (adx_min=0). This is the ADX abolition test. Data shows monotonic PF improvement with ADX relaxation: ADX>20→baseline, ADX>15→improved, ADX>10→PF=1.907. The logical limit is adx_min=0 (accept ALL supertrend flips regardless of ADX). If PF maintains ≥1.8, ADX gating is UNNECESSARY — the supertrend signal alone carries full edge. If PF drops below 1.5, there IS a floor to ADX relaxation and ADX>10 is the proven sweet spot. This variant uses the proven 8:1 R:R to isolate the ADX variable — same R:R as the champion (PF=1.921), only ADX gate removed. Expected: >100 trades (more than 99 with ADX>10, as zero-ADX signals are now included).

entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (supertrend bearish direction change).
